metadata.source_request: @grabowski umsetzen; next Schauwerk ball after SW-009 gate

implementation_evidence.title: feat: add SW-009 live apply candidate check
implementation_evidence.self_review: PASS: adds local SW-009 candidate manifest template and checker only; checker reads local scaffold and SW-003 evidence, requires a digest-bound candidate manifest, rejects provider references/URLs, and keeps mutation_attempted=false plus live_apply_attempted=false. No Miro access, provider mutation, provider identifiers, or automatic live apply executor.

metadata.outcome: SW-009 live apply now has a reproducible local candidate manifest and candidate receipt check before any human/operator live apply action.

title: Prepare SW-009 live apply candidate manifest check
goal: Add a local, digest-bound SW-009 live apply candidate manifest template and checker so a later live apply candidate can be reviewed reproducibly before any provider mutation.

acceptance.assertion: A candidate manifest template can be emitted locally.
A candidate check loads local scaffold and SW-003 evidence, calls the SW-009 live-apply gate, and emits a candidate receipt.
The candidate manifest requires a valid digest and blocks mismatches or missing digests.
Provider URLs or provider references are rejected before candidate readiness is granted.
The candidate check does not call Miro, does not mutate providers, and does not execute live apply.
